title: Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment: What It Actually Is and How It Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, struggling to sell ebooks online due to PayPal's geographic restrictions. You've tried other platforms, but they either don't accept your client's payment method or charge hefty fees. You need a way to deliver ebooks automatically after receiving a crypto payment, without relying on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. That's where the Core Shop Engine comes in – a full backend solution that makes it possible.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is a technology that enables digital creators to sell and deliver their ebooks without the need for traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. It's a game-changer for creators in restricted countries or with limited banking options, as it allows them to receive payments and deliver their ebooks instantly, without the hassle of intermediaries. This technology is crucial for building trust and credibility with clients, who can now receive their ebooks directly after payment, without waiting for manual intervention.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine is a full-backend solution that integrates with popular crypto payment gateways, such as NOWPayments. When a client pays for an ebook using their preferred cryptocurrency, the payment is verified in real-time, and the ebook is automatically delivered to the client's email address. The process is seamless, with no need for manual intervention or intermediate storage. The ebook is delivered directly from the creator's website, ensuring a smooth and secure experience for both the creator and the client.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is designed for digital creators who struggle to sell their ebooks online due to geographic restrictions, limited banking options, or high fees. It's perfect for creators in countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh, where traditional payment processors are often unavailable or unreliable. By using the Core Shop Engine, creators can build a secure and reliable ecosystem for selling and delivering their ebooks, without relying on intermediaries.
Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment is a secure and reliable technology that enables digital creators to sell and deliver their ebooks without intermediaries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is a comprehensive solution that integrates several key components: a bot engine for automated delivery, payment verification for secure transactions, and PDF receipts for client satisfaction. These components work together seamlessly to provide a smooth and secure experience for both the creator and the client. By using the Core Shop Engine, creators can build a reliable ecosystem for selling and delivering their ebooks, without the need for manual intervention.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using the Core Shop Engine, simply sign up for an account and integrate the solution with your website. Configure the payment gateway and ebook delivery settings, and you're ready to go! You can then start selling your ebooks and delivering them automatically after receiving a crypto payment. With the Core Shop Engine, you can build a secure and reliable ecosystem for selling and delivering your ebooks, without relying on intermediaries.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling ebooks using the Core Shop Engine, follow these concrete steps: sign up for an account, configure the payment gateway and ebook delivery settings, create a secure and user-friendly website using the provided template, and start selling your ebooks. By following these steps, you can build a reliable ecosystem for selling and delivering your ebooks, without the need for manual intervention.
